parameters.initialMessages: Hi there welcome to the Portland Company Profiler, what would you like to do? [ add 06880902 10 Trading, Bulk ] [ list ]

parameters.jsCode:
try{const raw=$input.first().json.data;if(!raw)return[{json:{ollamaBody:null,hasImages:false,debug:'no data from download'}}];const html=String(raw).substring(0,500000);const text=html.replace(/<[^>]{0,500}>/g,' ').replace(/ /g,' ').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/£/g,'£').replace(/&#[0-9]+;/g,' ').replace(/[ 	]{2,}/g,' ').replace(/
{3,}/g,'

');const lower=text.toLowerCase();const findFirst=function(terms){let pos=-1;for(const t of terms){const p=lower.indexOf(t);if(p>-1&&(pos===-1||p<pos))pos=p;}return pos;};const plStart=findFirst(['turnover','revenue','income statement','profit and loss account']);const bsStart=findFirst(['net assets','total equity','total net assets']);const plExtract=plStart>-1?text.substring(Math.max(0,plStart-100),plStart+3000):'';const bsExtract=bsStart>-1?text.substring(Math.max(0,bsStart-100),bsStart+2000):'';const extract=[plExtract,bsExtract?'--- BALANCE SHEET ---
'+bsExtract:''].filter(Boolean).join('

');if(!extract)return[{json:{ollamaBody:null,hasImages:false,debug:'no financial markers found'}}];const prompt='You are reading UK company accounts from an iXBRL filing. Find these figures from the CURRENT YEAR column only:

1. Annual turnover or revenue (GBP)
2. Average number of employees
3. Net assets or total equity (GBP)
4. Profit after tax (GBP) - negative if a loss
5. Financial year end date

In UK accounts, figures in parentheses e.g. (45,000) are negative. Always output negatives with a minus sign.

State each on its own line:
Turnover: £2,450,000
Employees: 45
Net assets: £890,000
Profit: £123,456
Year: 2023

If a loss: Profit: -£45,000
If not found: write null.

ACCOUNTS TEXT:
'+extract;const body=JSON.stringify({model:'qwen3.5:27b',prompt:prompt,stream:false,think:false});return[{json:{ollamaBody:body,hasImages:false}}];}catch(e){return[{json:{ollamaBody:null,hasImages:false,debug:'error: '+String(e)}}];}

const imgData=($input.first().json||{}).images||[];
if(imgData.length===0)return[{json:{ollamaBody:null,hasImages:false}}];
const prompt='You are reading pages from UK company accounts filed at Companies House. Look carefully at every page and find these four figures.

In UK accounts, tables always show TWO columns: the LEFT column is the CURRENT YEAR and the RIGHT column is the prior year. Always take figures from the LEFT (current year) column only.

1. Annual turnover or revenue (in GBP) - LEFT column only
2. Average number of employees - LEFT column only, single total figure
3. Net assets or total equity (in GBP) - LEFT column only
4. Profit after tax (in GBP) - LEFT column only. This may be negative (a loss).
5. Financial year end date

IMPORTANT: If column headings show figures are in thousands (e.g. £000 or £ 000), multiply each figure by 1000 to give the full amount. Preserve the sign for profit — use a minus sign if it is a loss. In UK accounts, figures shown in parentheses e.g. (£45,000) are negative. Always output negative values with a minus sign, not parentheses.

State each figure on its own line in exactly this format:
Turnover: £2,450,000
Employees: 45
Net assets: £890,000
Profit: £123,456
Year: 2023

If a figure is a loss, write it as: Profit: -£45,000
If you cannot find a figure, write null for that line. Do not list multiple values for the same field.';
const body=JSON.stringify({model:'qwen2.5vl:7b',prompt:prompt,images:imgData,stream:false});
return[{json:{ollamaBody:body,hasImages:true}}];

const p=$input.first().json;const fin=p.financials||{};const date=new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB');const subj='Customer Profile Added: '+p.companyName+' ('+p.companyNumber+')';const html='

Customer Profile Saved

Profile for '+p.companyName+' ('+p.companyNumber+') saved on '+date+'

Ranking'+p.customerRanking+'/10
Products'+(p.products||[]).join(', ')+'
Address'+p.address+'
SIC Codes'+(p.sicCodes||[]).join(', ')+'
Incorporated'+(p.incorporated||'Unknown')+'
Directors'+(p.directors||[]).join('
')+'
Turnover'+(fin.turnover?'\u00a3'+fin.turnover.toLocaleString():'Not extracted')+'
Employees'+(fin.employees||'Not extracted')+'
Net Assets'+(fin.netAssets?'\u00a3'+fin.netAssets.toLocaleString():'Not extracted')+'
Profit After Tax'+(fin.profitAfterTax!=null?(fin.profitAfterTax<0?'-\u00a3'+Math.abs(fin.profitAfterTax).toLocaleString():'\u00a3'+fin.profitAfterTax.toLocaleString()):'Not extracted')+'
Accounts Year'+(fin.accountsYear||'Unknown')+'

Generated '+new Date().toISOString()+' via n8n / amelai

';return[{json:{subject:subj,htmlBody:html}}];
